title: asaemia minuta subsp. inermis
intro: Asaemia minuta subsp. inermis, also known as the thorny leaved Asaemia, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of southern China and northern Vietnam. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive issues, due to its rich content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins. Asaemia minuta subsp. inermis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional remedies.
